items.title: Memory shortage could cause the biggest dip in smartphone shipments in over a decade
items.description: IDC says phone makers will ship only 1.12 billion smartphones as compared to 1.26 billion last year.

items.title: Ultrahuman bets on redesigned smart ring to win back U.S. market after Oura dispute
items.description: Ultrahuman’s Ring Pro promises 15-day battery life and a $479 price tag as the wearables maker expands its health-tech push.
